description: Remote Windows execution profile for UI-heavy or TestClient flows
notes: Используйте этот профиль, если UI/TestClient лучше работают на Windows-хосте или в Windows VM.
Стандартные операции create/load/dump/update будут собирать argv из structured profile и передавать их в scripts/adapters/remote-windows.sh.
Ibcmd driver не поддерживается с runnerAdapter=remote-windows в текущем release; для core capabilities оставляйте driver=designer.

xunit.unsupportedReason: Windows xUnit contour is not shipped in the template baseline; keep it fail-closed until a repo-owned Windows runner exists.

bdd.unsupportedReason: Windows BDD contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.

smoke.unsupportedReason: Windows smoke contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.

publishHttp.unsupportedReason: Windows publish contour is project-specific; wire a real command before treating this profile as green.
